front: Novel: Sabina wears her grandfather's bowler hat during sex; it is a 'motif in the musical composition that is' her life
back: The Unbearable Lightness of Being (Milan Kundera)

front: Novel: the protagonist loses his job as a surgeon after writing an editorial comparing the Communist Party to Oedipus; becomes a window cleaner
back: The Unbearable Lightness of Being (Milan Kundera)

front: Novel: the protagonist considers Beethoven's 'Es muss sein!' when deciding whether to return to Prague
back: The Unbearable Lightness of Being (Milan Kundera)

front: Novel: a female dog named after a male Russian literary character befriends the pig Mefisto and dies of cancer, appearing to smile at its owners
back: The Unbearable Lightness of Being (Milan Kundera)

front: Novel: a 'Short Dictionary of Misunderstood Words' contrasts a painter and her lover Franz; 'kitsch' is defined as 'the absolute denial of shit'
back: The Unbearable Lightness of Being (Milan Kundera)

front: Novel: Tereza photographs Russian tanks invading Prague; dreams of marching naked around a pool
back: The Unbearable Lightness of Being (Milan Kundera)

front: Novel: Helena mistakenly attempts suicide with laxatives rather than aspirin after a revenge seduction
back: The Joke (Milan Kundera)

front: Novel: during a Moravian folk festival, an effort to revive a 'Ride of the Kings' ceremony is interrupted by a motorcycle gang
back: The Joke (Milan Kundera)

front: Novel: the protagonist realizes the woman shaving his face is an old acquaintance named Lucie Sebetka
back: The Joke (Milan Kundera)

front: Novel: opens with Communists erasing Clementis from a photograph but forgetting to erase the hat he loaned to Gottwald
back: The Book of Laughter and Forgetting (Milan Kundera)

front: Novel: seven parts, a 'novel in the form of variations'; parts titled 'Lost Letters' and 'The Angels' each appear twice
back: The Book of Laughter and Forgetting (Milan Kundera)

front: Novel: a character with untranslatable 'litost' tries to get with Kristyna; the professor Voltaire hosts a gathering of poets
back: The Book of Laughter and Forgetting (Milan Kundera)

front: Novel: Mama cares more about ripe pears than the invasion: 'tanks are perishable, pears are eternal'
back: The Book of Laughter and Forgetting (Milan Kundera)

front: Work: essay collection examining 'The Depreciated Legacy of Cervantes'; champions 'polyphony' in Broch's The Sleepwalkers; defines 63 key words
back: The Art of the Novel (Milan Kundera)

front: Novel: Professor Avenarius slashes tires; a celestial trial features Eluard, Rilke, and Rolland ruling against Goethe's ghost; narrator sees Agnes waving at a swimming teacher
back: Immortality (Milan Kundera)

front: Author: Testaments Betrayed discusses Max Brod's betrayal of Kafka; includes the Diderot-inspired play Jacques and his Master
back: Milan Kundera

front: Novel: the poet Jaromil claims 'Lyric poets generally come from homes run by women' and turns his girlfriend's brother into the police for fleeing the country
back: Life is Elsewhere (Milan Kundera)

front: Author: Ignorance opens with an Odyssean etymology of 'nostalgia' from Greek nostos and algos
back: Milan Kundera

front: Novel: set in a spa town with eight characters; a doctor secretly injects women with his own sperm as a fertility treatment
back: The Farewell Waltz (Milan Kundera)

front: Author: in 'Eduard and God,' an atheist teacher pretends to be a believer to win Alice; in another story, a couple roleplays as hitchhiker and driver
back: Laughable Loves (Milan Kundera)
